pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location), (p)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain) WHERE loc.province = '广东省' AND substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) = '2021' WITH o.name AS org, count(DISTINCT p) AS count ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 15 RETURN org, count
final_answer: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location), (p)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain) WHERE loc.province = '广东省' AND substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) = '2021' WITH o.name AS org, count(DISTINCT p) AS count ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 15 RETURN org, count

question: 2012年哪个省份的专利数量最多？列出前10名。？
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent) WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) = '2012' MATCH (p)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location) WHERE loc.province IS NOT NULL AND loc.province <> '' WITH loc.province AS province, count(DISTINCT p) AS count RETURN province, count ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10

question: 氢燃料电池领域最近申请的20项专利是哪些？
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain {name: '氢燃料电池'}) RETURN p.application_no AS app_no, p.title_cn AS title, p.application_date AS date ORDER BY p.application_date DESC LIMIT 20
pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain {name: '氢燃料电池'}) WHERE td.name = '氢燃料电池' ORDER BY substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) DESC, p.application_date DESC LIMIT 20 RETURN p.title_cn AS title, p.application_date AS application_date, p.application_no AS application_number ORDER BY substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) DESC, p.application_date DESC LIMIT 20
final_answer: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain {name: '氢燃料电池'}) WHERE td.name = '氢燃料电池' ORDER BY substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) DESC, p.application_date DESC LIMIT 20 RETURN p.title_cn AS title, p.application_date AS application_date, p.application_no AS application_number ORDER BY substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) DESC, p.application_date DESC LIMIT 20

question: 2012年到2017年各技术领域的专利数量分别是多少，哪个领域最多？
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent) WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) >= '2012' AND substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) <= '2017' MATCH (p)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain) WITH td.name AS domain, count(DISTINCT p) AS count RETURN domain, count ORDER BY count DESC
pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent) WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) >= '2012' AND substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) <= '2017' MATCH (p)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain) WITH td.name AS domain, substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, count(DISTINCT p) AS count GROUP BY domain, year ORDER BY count DESC RETURN domain, year, count
final_answer: MATCH (p:Patent) WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) >= '2012' AND substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) <= '2017' MATCH (p)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain) WITH td.name AS domain, substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, count(DISTINCT p) AS count GROUP BY domain, year ORDER BY count DESC RETURN domain, year, count

question: 公司在合金储氢领域的专利最多被转让过多少次？
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization {entity_type: '公司'}), (p)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain {name: '合金储氢'}) RETURN max(p.transfer_count) AS max_transfer
pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain {name: '合金储氢'}), (p)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(o:Organization) WHERE td.name = '合金储氢' WITH o, count(DISTINCT p) AS transfer_count, o.name AS company_name ORDER BY transfer_count DESC LIMIT 1 RETURN company_name, transfer_count
final_answer: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain {name: '合金储氢'}), (p)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(o:Organization) WHERE td.name = '合金储氢' WITH o, count(DISTINCT p) AS transfer_count, o.name AS company_name ORDER BY transfer_count DESC LIMIT 1 RETURN company_name, transfer_count

question: 宣城市的专利中涉及诉讼的占比是多少？
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location) WHERE loc.city = '宣城市' WITH count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.litigation_count > 0 THEN p END) AS with_litigation, count(DISTINCT p) AS total RETURN with_litigation, total, round(with_litigation * 100.0 / total * 100) / 100 AS ratio
pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location) WHERE loc.city = '宣城市' AND p.litigation_count > 0 RETURN count(DISTINCT p) * 1.0 / (MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location) WHERE loc.city = '宣城市' RETURN count(DISTINCT p)) AS litigation_ratio
final_answer: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location) WHERE loc.city = '宣城市' AND p.litigation_count > 0 RETURN count(DISTINCT p) * 1.0 / (MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location) WHERE loc.city = '宣城市' RETURN count(DISTINCT p)) AS litigation_ratio

pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location), (p)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain) WHERE loc.province = '辽宁省' AND td.name = '制氢技术' RETURN count(DISTINCT p) AS total
final_answer: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location), (p)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain) WHERE loc.province = '辽宁省' AND td.name = '制氢技术' RETURN count(DISTINCT p) AS total

question: 每年被华中科技大学受让的专利有多少件？
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(o:Organization) WHERE o.name CONTAINS '华中科技大学' WITH substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, count(DISTINCT p) AS count RETURN year, count ORDER BY year
pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(o:Organization) WHERE o.name CONTAINS '华中科技大学' WITH substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, p MATCH (p)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain) WITH year, count(DISTINCT p) AS count GROUP BY year ORDER BY year RETURN year, count ORDER BY year
final_answer: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(o:Organization) WHERE o.name CONTAINS '华中科技大学' WITH substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, p MATCH (p)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain) WITH year, count(DISTINCT p) AS count GROUP BY year ORDER BY year RETURN year, count ORDER BY year

question: 请按年份统计被罗伯特·博世有限公司受让的专利数量。？
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(o:Organization) WHERE o.name CONTAINS '罗伯特·博世有限公司' WITH substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, count(DISTINCT p) AS count RETURN year, count ORDER BY year
pred_cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(o:Organization {name: '罗伯特·博世有限公司'}) WHERE p.transfer_count > 0 WITH p, year(substring(p.application_date, 0, 4)) AS year MATCH (p)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(a:Organization) RETURN year, count(DISTINCT p) AS count GROUP BY year ORDER BY year ASC

question: 林德股份公司2008年的专利申请涉及哪些技术领域，以及各领域有多少件专利？

pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization {name: '林德股份公司'}), (p)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain) WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) = '2008' WITH td.name AS domain, count(DISTINCT p) AS count RETURN domain, count ORDER BY count DESC
final_answer: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization {name: '林德股份公司'}), (p)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain) WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) = '2008' WITH td.name AS domain, count(DISTINCT p) AS count RETURN domain, count ORDER BY count DESC

question: 2018年到2021年间，每年专利申请的数量是怎样的变化趋势？
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent) WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) >= '2018' AND substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) <= '2021' WITH substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, count(DISTINCT p) AS count WHERE toInteger(year) >= 2018 RETURN year, count ORDER BY year
pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent) WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) >= '2018' AND substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) <= '2021' WITH substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, count(DISTINCT p) AS count ORDER BY year RETURN year, count ORDER BY year ASC
final_answer: MATCH (p:Patent) WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) >= '2018' AND substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) <= '2021' WITH substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, count(DISTINCT p) AS count ORDER BY year RETURN year, count ORDER BY year ASC

final_answer: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain {name: '有机储氢'}) WHERE td.name = '有机储氢' ORDER BY substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) DESC LIMIT 10 RETURN p.application_no, p.title_cn, p.application_date, p.patent_type, p.transfer_count, p.license_count, p.pledge_count, p.litigation_count

question: 2013年到2020年，哪些国家的专利数量排在前五名？
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent) WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) >= '2013' AND substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) <= '2020' MATCH (p)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location) WHERE loc.country IS NOT NULL AND loc.country <> '' WITH loc.country AS country, count(DISTINCT p) AS count RETURN country, count ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent) WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) >= '2013' AND substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) <= '2020' MATCH (p)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location) WITH loc.country AS country, count(DISTINCT p) AS count ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN country, count
final_answer: MATCH (p:Patent) WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) >= '2013' AND substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) <= '2020' MATCH (p)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location) WITH loc.country AS country, count(DISTINCT p) AS count ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN country, count

gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent) WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) = '2013' RETURN p.application_no AS app_no, p.title_cn AS title, substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year LIMIT 20
pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent) WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) = '2013' RETURN p.application_no, p.title_cn, p.application_date, p.patent_type, p.transfer_count, p.license_count, p.pledge_count, p.litigation_count, p.abstract_cn LIMIT 10000
final_answer: MATCH (p:Patent) WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) = '2013' RETURN p.application_no, p.title_cn, p.application_date, p.patent_type, p.transfer_count, p.license_count, p.pledge_count, p.litigation_count, p.abstract_cn LIMIT 10000

WITH loc.country AS country, count(DISTINCT p) AS count
GROUP BY country
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 5
RETURN country, count

question: 奥迪股份公司每年申请了多少专利？
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization) WHERE o.name CONTAINS '奥迪股份公司' WITH substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, count(DISTINCT p) AS count RETURN year, count ORDER BY year
pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization) WHERE o.name CONTAINS '奥迪股份公司' RETURN count(DISTINCT p) AS annual_patent_count, substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year GROUP BY year ORDER BY year ASC
final_answer: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization) WHERE o.name CONTAINS '奥迪股份公司' RETURN count(DISTINCT p) AS annual_patent_count, substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year GROUP BY year ORDER BY year ASC

question: 江西省在2012年申请了多少项氢能相关专利？

final_answer: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location), (p)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain) WHERE loc.province = '江西省' AND substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) = '2012' AND td.name CONTAINS '氢能' RETURN count(DISTINCT p) AS total_patents

question: 2011年到2020年哪些国家的专利数量排名前十？
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent) WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) >= '2011' AND substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) <= '2020' MATCH (p)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location) WHERE loc.country IS NOT NULL AND loc.country <> '' WITH loc.country AS country, count(DISTINCT p) AS count RETURN country, count ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10
pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent) WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) >= '2011' AND substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) <= '2020' MATCH (p)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location) WITH loc.country AS country, count(DISTINCT p) AS count ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10 RETURN country, count
final_answer: MATCH (p:Patent) WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) >= '2011' AND substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) <= '2020' MATCH (p)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location) WITH loc.country AS country, count(DISTINCT p) AS count ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10 RETURN country, count

question: 武汉雄韬氢雄燃料电池科技有限公司每年申请了多少专利？

pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization), (p)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain) WHERE o.name = '武汉雄韬氢雄燃料电池科技有限公司' AND td.name = '氢燃料电池' RETURN count(DISTINCT p) AS total_patents, substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, count(DISTINCT p) FILTER (WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) = '2022') AS patents_2022 GROUP BY year ORDER BY year ASC

final_answer: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain {name: '物理储氢'}), (p)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location {province: '广东省'}) WHERE td.level = '3' RETURN count(DISTINCT p) AS total_patents, substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year GROUP BY year ORDER BY year ASC

ORDER BY count DESC

question: 山东省每年的专利申请数量是多少？
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location) WHERE loc.province = '山东省' WITH substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, count(DISTINCT p) AS count RETURN year, count ORDER BY year
pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent), (p)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location) WHERE loc.province = '山东省' AND p.application_date IS NOT NULL RETURN count(DISTINCT p) AS total, substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, count(DISTINCT p) FILTER (WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) = '2022') AS count_2022 GROUP BY year ORDER BY year ASC
final_answer: MATCH (p:Patent), (p)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location) WHERE loc.province = '山东省' AND p.application_date IS NOT NULL RETURN count(DISTINCT p) AS total, substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, count(DISTINCT p) FILTER (WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) = '2022') AS count_2022 GROUP BY year ORDER BY year ASC

question: 哪些年份有涉及诉讼的氢能专利，以及从2015年起这些专利的数量变化趋势是怎样的？
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent) WHERE p.litigation_count > 0 WITH substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, count(DISTINCT p) AS count WHERE toInteger(year) >= 2015 RETURN year, count ORDER BY year
pred_cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:LITIGATION_COUNT]->(lc:LitigationCount), (p)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain {name: '氢能'}) 
WITH substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, count(DISTINCT p) AS count 
WHERE year >= '2015' 
RETURN year, count 
ORDER BY year ASC
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:LITIGATION_COUNT]->(lc:LitigationCount), (p)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain {name: '氢能'}) 
WITH year, count, COLLECT({year: year, count: count}) AS trends 
RETURN year, REDUCE(acc = {year: trends[0].year, count: 0}, t IN trends | {year: t.year, count: acc.count + t.count}) AS cumulative_count 
ORDER BY year ASC

question: 2011年到2016年间，有多少专利被转让过，以及它们占同期专利申请总量的比例是多少？
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent) WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) >= '2011' AND substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) <= '2016' WITH count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.transfer_count > 0 THEN p END) AS with_transfer, count(DISTINCT p) AS total RETURN with_transfer, total, round(with_transfer * 100.0 / total * 100) / 100 AS ratio
pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent) WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) >= '2011' AND substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) <= '2016' WITH count(DISTINCT p) AS total_patents MATCH (p)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->() WITH total_patents, count(DISTINCT p) AS transferred_patents RETURN transferred_patents, transferred_patents * 1.0 / total_patents AS ratio
final_answer: MATCH (p:Patent) WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) >= '2011' AND substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) <= '2016' WITH count(DISTINCT p) AS total_patents MATCH (p)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->() WITH total_patents, count(DISTINCT p) AS transferred_patents RETURN transferred_patents, transferred_patents * 1.0 / total_patents AS ratio

LIMIT 5
final_answer:

question: 2006年到2018年间，各技术领域的专利数量分别是多少？
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent) WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) >= '2006' AND substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) <= '2018' MATCH (p)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain) WITH td.name AS domain, count(DISTINCT p) AS count RETURN domain, count ORDER BY count DESC
pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain) WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) >= '2006' AND substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) <= '2018' WITH td.name AS domain, substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, count(DISTINCT p) AS count GROUP BY domain, year ORDER BY domain, year RETURN domain, year, count ORDER BY domain, year
final_answer: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain) WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) >= '2006' AND substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) <= '2018' WITH td.name AS domain, substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, count(DISTINCT p) AS count GROUP BY domain, year ORDER BY domain, year RETURN domain, year, count ORDER BY domain, year

MATCH (p:Patent) WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) IN ['2018', '2019'] RETURN substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count ORDER BY year ASC

question: 2006年，在制氢技术领域里，哪五个机构的专利申请数量最多？
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain {name: '制氢技术'}) WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) = '2006' MATCH (p)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization) WITH o.name AS org, count(DISTINCT p) AS count RETURN org, count ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain) WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) = '2006' AND td.name = '制氢技术' WITH o.name AS org, count(DISTINCT p) AS count ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN org, count
final_answer: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain) WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) = '2006' AND td.name = '制氢技术' WITH o.name AS org, count(DISTINCT p) AS count ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN org, count

question: 请找出公司在无机储氢领域的专利详情，包括专利号、标题、摘要和申请日期。？
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization {entity_type: '公司'}), (p)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain {name: '无机储氢'}) RETURN p.application_no AS app_no, p.title_cn AS title, p.abstract_cn AS abstract, p.application_date AS date LIMIT 10
pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain {name: '无机储氢'}), (p)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization {entity_type: '公司'}) RETURN p.application_no, p.title_cn, p.abstract_cn, p.application_date ORDER BY p.application_date DESC
final_answer: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain {name: '无机储氢'}), (p)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization {entity_type: '公司'}) RETURN p.application_no, p.title_cn, p.abstract_cn, p.application_date ORDER BY p.application_date DESC

question: 北京科技大学2024年的专利中，哪些省份的专利数量最多？
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization) WHERE o.name CONTAINS '北京科技大学' AND substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) = '2024' MATCH (p)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location) WHERE loc.province IS NOT NULL AND loc.province <> '' WITH loc.province AS province, count(DISTINCT p) AS count RETURN province, count ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10
pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization), (p)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location) WHERE o.name CONTAINS '北京科技大学' AND substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) = '2024' WITH loc.province AS province, count(DISTINCT p) AS count ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 1 RETURN province, count
final_answer: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization), (p)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location) WHERE o.name CONTAINS '北京科技大学' AND substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) = '2024' WITH loc.province AS province, count(DISTINCT p) AS count ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 1 RETURN province, count

question: 物理储氢领域里，每年有多少专利申请是有转让记录的？
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain {name: '物理储氢'}) WHERE p.transfer_count > 0 WITH substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, count(DISTINCT p) AS count RETURN year, count ORDER BY year
pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain {name: '物理储氢'}), (p)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO|TRANSFERRED_TO*]->(t) WHERE td.level = '3' RETURN substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count GROUP BY year ORDER BY year ASC
final_answer: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain {name: '物理储氢'}), (p)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO|TRANSFERRED_TO*]->(t) WHERE td.level = '3' RETURN substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count GROUP BY year ORDER BY year ASC

question: 青海省从2020年起每年的氢能专利申请数量是多少？
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location) WHERE loc.province = '青海省' WITH substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, count(DISTINCT p) AS count WHERE toInteger(year) >= 2020 RETURN year, count ORDER BY year
pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent), (p)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location) WHERE loc.province = '青海省' AND substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) >= '2020' RETURN substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, count(DISTINCT p) AS count GROUP BY year ORDER BY year ASC
final_answer: MATCH (p:Patent), (p)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location) WHERE loc.province = '青海省' AND substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) >= '2020' RETURN substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, count(DISTINCT p) AS count GROUP BY year ORDER BY year ASC

question: 请列出中国台湾地区申请的氢能专利，包括专利号、中文标题和申请年份，最多显示20条记录。？
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location) WHERE loc.country = '中国台湾' RETURN p.application_no AS app_no, p.title_cn AS title, substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year LIMIT 20
pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent {application_date: '*,*,*'}), (p)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location) WHERE loc.country = '中国' AND loc.province = '台湾省' RETURN p.application_no AS 专利号, p.title_cn AS 中文标题, substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS 申请年份 LIMIT 20
final_answer: MATCH (p:Patent {application_date: '*,*,*'}), (p)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location) WHERE loc.country = '中国' AND loc.province = '台湾省' RETURN p.application_no AS 专利号, p.title_cn AS 中文标题, substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS 申请年份 LIMIT 20

question: 研究机构在氢制冷领域申请专利数量最多的前10个省份是哪些？
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization {entity_type: '研究机构'}), (p)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain {name: '氢制冷'}) MATCH (p)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location) WHERE loc.province IS NOT NULL AND loc.province <> '' WITH loc.province AS province, count(DISTINCT p) AS count RETURN province, count ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10
pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain), (o)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location) WHERE o.entity_type = '研究机构' AND td.name = '氢制冷' WITH loc.province AS province, count(DISTINCT p) AS count ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10 RETURN province, count
final_answer: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain), (o)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location) WHERE o.entity_type = '研究机构' AND td.name = '氢制冷' WITH loc.province AS province, count(DISTINCT p) AS count ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10 RETURN province, count
